title: gentiana scabra f. angustifolia
intro: Gentiana scabra f. angustifolia is a subspecies of the Gentian family, also known as the "root of life" or "qin jiao" in traditional Chinese medicine, referring to its medicinal properties and uses. It is primarily found in the mountainous regions of China and has been used for centuries in herbal medicine to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds, including alkaloids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties and offer various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antioxidant effects. Gentiana scabra f. angustifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
